title: Algebra I - Easy Factorising Sheet
text:
Algebra I: Easy Factorising Practice


Part A: Factorising Quadratics (Simple)

Factorise: \(x^{2} + 7x + 10\)
Factorise: \(x^{2} + 4x - 12\)
Factorise: \(x^{2} - 6x + 9\)




Part B: Common Factor

Factorise: \(6x + 15\)
Factorise: \(8a^{2} - 12a\)
Factorise: \(5y^{3} - 20y^{2}\)




Part C: Difference of Squares + Grouping

Factorise: \(x^{2} - 16\)
Factorise: \(9m^{2} - 25\)
Factorise: \(x^{2} + 5x + 6 - (x + 2)\)




Bonus (Optional): Check your answers

\(x^{2} + 7x + 10 = (x + 2)(x + 5)\)
\(x^{2} + 4x - 12 = (x + 6)(x - 2)\)
\(x^{2} - 6x + 9 = (x - 3)^{2}\)
\(6x + 15 = 3(2x + 5)\)
\(8a^{2} - 12a = 4a(2a - 3)\)
\(5y^{3} - 20y^{2} = 5y^{2}(y - 4)\)
\(x^{2} - 16 = (x - 4)(x + 4)\)
\(9m^{2} - 25 = (3m - 5)(3m + 5)\)
\(x^{2} + 5x + 6 - (x + 2) = (x + 2)(x + 3) - (x + 2) = (x + 2)(x + 2)\)

title: Algebra I - Chapter 1 Quiz
text:
Algebra I: Chapter 1 Quiz


Part A: Simplifying Expressions

Simplify: \(3(x + 5) - 2(2x - 1)\)
Simplify: \(\frac{12a^{2}b}{4ab}\)
Combine terms: \(5y^{2} + 3y - 2(y^{2} - y)\)




Part B: Solving Equations

Solve for \(x\): \[4x - 7 = 13\]
Solve for \(w\): \[2(w + 4) = 5w - 1\]
Solve for \(x\): \[\frac{x}{3} + 5 = 11\]




Part C: Inequalities & Factoring

Solve: \(3z + 4 \leq 19\)
Factor completely: \[x^{2} + 5x + 6\]




Part D: Word Problem

A taxi service charges a flat fee of $5.00 plus \(2.50 per mile (\)m$). If the total bill was \(25.00, write and solve the equation:\)\(5 + 2.50m = 25\)$
